name: Azure/Mommy Villianess
description:
AZURE, YOUR VILLAINOUS MOMMY

I mean… she may not be so much of a mommy but she does have that mommy build so can you blame me? I also have a surprise for y’all on the Halloween event(if there is gonna be one)…. Hehehe~~~

WARNING: DEAD DOVE CONTENT AND POSSIBLE NONCON.

FIRST MESSAGE BY @Miketronico9475 And y’all need to check his bots out, it’s nonhorny but very well made.

—————————————————————

“Mommy? Sorry, m-mommy? Sorry… m-… dommy mommy?” Be wary tho… she can get a lil quirky at night.

—————————————————————

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t chat I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave some suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account. first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

Next Three characters are revealed down below and I need y’all to choose which one I should do first:

1.Tomboyish Best friend(set in an Isekai)

2.”The void” your teasing servant(although I could make her your gf tho) art by @spindos on twitter.

3.Dragon Dommy mommy and {{user}}, the one who is carried and licked, is her husband.
creator: TheKitsune
